001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
010import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.databinding.FragmentFossilViewDialogBinding;
012
013/**
014 * Full-screen dialog fragment for displaying detailed information about a fossil.
015 * Shows the fossil image, scientific name, geological era, and other relevant details.
016 */
017@AndroidEntryPoint
018public class FossilViewDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
019
020  /**
021   * Tag identifier for this fragment, used for logging and fragment transactions.
022   */
023  public static final String TAG = "FossilViewDialogFragment";
024
025  private FragmentFossilViewDialogBinding binding;
026
027  @Override
028  public void onCreate(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
029    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
030    // Set full-screen dialog style
031    setStyle(STYLE_NO_TITLE, android.R.style.Theme_Material_NoActionBar);
032  }
033
034  @Nullable
035  @Override
036  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
037      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
038    binding = FragmentFossilViewDialogBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
039
040    // Set up close button
041    binding.toolbar.setNavigationOnClickListener((v) -> dismiss());
042
043    // TODO: Get fossil data from arguments
044    // TODO: Load fossil image from URI
045    // TODO: Populate TextViews with fossil information
046
047    return binding.getRoot();
048  }
049
050  @Override
051  public void onDestroyView() {
052    binding = null;
053    super.onDestroyView();
054  }
055}
